jobs.title: Performance Marketing Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.description: Du hast Bock, in einer der kreativsten und führenden Filmproduktionsagenturen Deutschlands anspruchsvolle Social Media-Kampagnen für Premium-Kunden zu entwickeln? Du sprichst fließend Instagram und TikTok, weißt, was die Meta Business Suite ist, und verstehst, warum manche Videos viral gehen und andere nicht? Dann bewirb dich jetzt bei uns in Leipzig, werde Teil unseres Teams und gestalte unsere strategische Ausrichtung aktiv mit. Zur Verstärkung suchen wir ab sofort eine/n Performance Marketing Manager (m/w/d) Teilzeit in Leipzig Aufgaben Als Performance Marketing Manager treibst du den messbaren Geschäftserfolg unserer Kunden durch datengetriebene Paid-Social-Kampagnen auf TikTok, Instagra
jobs.why: This has an excellent overlap with your creative strategy skills, focusing heavily on Meta/TikTok video performance, hooks, and why videos go viral.
jobs.proposal_opener: I don't just write scripts; I engineer hooks and pattern-interrupts for Meta and TikTok that stop the scroll and drive conversions.
jobs.flags: German agency, likely requires German language
jobs.summary: This role involves developing and running social media campaigns on Meta and TikTok for premium clients at a creative film production agency. It requires a deep understanding of video performance and social algorithms.

jobs.title: Content Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Headquarters: United States URL: http://bentley.com Content Marketing Manager Location : Home-based, US   Position Summary:   The Product & Industry Marketing Group within Bentley Systems is currently looking for an individual with a  strong background in content marketing for our Content Marketing Manager  position. Our division is driving product and business growth. We are looking for an individual who can help us write and tell the story of how Bentley’s innovative products, solutions, and services are the best in the industry, and help differentiate our users among their competitors. If you are excited about building marketing campaigns from the ground up, bringi
jobs.why: A content marketing role at a major software company is a stretch for an early-career writer, but your landing page and direct-response copywriting skills are highly transferable.
jobs.proposal_opener: B2B content shouldn't just inform—it should convert. I write high-impact landing pages and email sequences that turn readers into qualified pipeline.
jobs.flags: corporate enterprise B2B, position as a conversion-focused content writer
jobs.summary: This position involves managing content marketing strategies and creation for an infrastructure engineering software company. It sits within the Product & Industry Marketing group to drive global digital engagement.

jobs.title: Product Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Headquarters: DEHZE90 - Holzwickede (Rhenus Warehousing Solutions Global GmbH & Co. KG) URL: http://rhenus.group What You Can Expect : Primary marketing contact within our Business Unit Warehousing Solutions Organization of global and local marketing campaigns Coordination and planning of product launches and related events Preparation and development of sales, marketing and social media contents Market research and best practice-sharing with internal teams International collaboration with various stakeholders What You Bring: Completed education or studies, ideally with focus on marketing, management or comparable qualification A minimum of 5 years of professional experience in Marketing
jobs.why: Product marketing and logistics event coordination is a stretch, but you can position yourself as the copywriter who crafts the launch collateral and email sequences.
jobs.proposal_opener: A successful product launch relies on messaging that resonates. I write high-converting landing pages and launch sequences that turn complex logistics into compelling offers.
jobs.flags: senior/coordination heavy role, position as supporting copywriter
jobs.summary: This role coordinates global and local marketing campaigns, product launches, and events for a global warehousing logistics business unit. It serves as the primary marketing point of contact for the division.

jobs.title: Field Marketing Specialist
jobs.description: Headquarters: United States URL: http://coloplast.com   The Field Marketing Specialist (FMS) is responsible for supporting the local awareness and adoption of Coloplast products through the deployment and execution of the Coloplast Guided Support Programs designed to help navigate and advance movement through the patient journey. This person will work with strategic accounts and ancillary staff, to adopt and successfully implement the Coloplast Guided Support Programs within their respective practices.   Major Areas of Accountability Serves as a project manager to oversee adoption, implementation, site activation and ongoing follow-up for specific marketing programs to the sel
jobs.why: Medical field marketing is highly regulated and relationship-driven, but your direct-response email and landing page copy can help guide the patient journey.
jobs.proposal_opener: Navigating the patient journey requires clear, empathetic, and highly persuasive communication. I write direct-response copy that builds trust and guides users to the next step.
jobs.flags: specialized medical/field marketing, remote but likely regional
jobs.summary: This role supports the adoption of medical products by executing guided support programs throughout the patient journey. It focuses on local market awareness and patient engagement.

jobs.title: Performance Marketing Manager, EMEA
jobs.description: About Us ID Sports is the headquarters behind the GIBBON brand in Europe. Since 2008, GIBBON has been one of the defining brands in the field of balance training. From Stuttgart, we steer international growth, further develop the brand, and drive our marketing and sales activities forward through digital channels. With the introduction of the SlackBoard, we are unlocking additional growth potential and further expanding brand awareness in relevant markets. Our products stand for balance, movement, and innovation, combining performance, health, and lifestyle. Job Summary We are seeking a highly motivated and results-driven Performance Marketing Manager to lead and scale our paid acquisition s
jobs.why: While this role focuses on overall performance marketing management, your Meta ad copy and creative strategy skills can help drive their digital growth.
jobs.proposal_opener: Great performance marketing lives and dies by the creative. I write high-converting Meta ad copy and design hooks that turn casual scrollers into GIBBON buyers.
jobs.flags: requires performance marketing management/media buying, likely needs German or local presence
jobs.summary: This role manages regional digital marketing and sales channels for a balance training brand. It focuses on driving international growth through performance campaigns.

jobs.title: Local Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Catenda builds the open BIM and common-data-environment platform that construction teams across Europe use to work together on their projects. DACH is our strongest and fastest-growing market — and we are now adding dedicated marketing capacity to keep that momentum going. Tasks What you’ll do Run demand generation for DACH — from campaign to qualified pipeline. Build campaigns from real customer evidence, not guesswork. Restart our presence in the AEC trade press with strong customer stories. Optimize our website and demand-capture paths for conversion. Run our trade-fair and event presence across the region. Keep marketing and sales tightly aligned on pipeline. Requirements What you bring
jobs.why: B2B demand generation requires solid copywriting, but this role is highly localized for the DACH market and likely requires German language skills.
jobs.proposal_opener: B2B SaaS growth comes down to clear, direct-response messaging. I write high-converting copy and email sequences that turn cold prospects into warm product demos.
jobs.flags: DACH focused, likely requires fluent German
jobs.summary: The role is responsible for driving demand generation and marketing campaigns in the DACH region for a construction software platform. It involves managing local marketing activities to maintain market momentum.

jobs.title: 05 - Marketing Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.description: Die FCR Immobilien AG ist ein dynamisches und wachsendes Unternehmen in der Immobilienbranche. Wir agieren schnell, pragmatisch und zielorientiert. Für unseren Standort in Pullach im Isartal suchen wir ab sofort einen motivierten Marketing Manager (m/w/d), der unsere Sichtbarkeit auf das nächste Level hebt. Wenn du Performance Marketing und Social Media liebst, gerne digitale Plattformen steuerst und gleichzeitig ein absoluter Teamplayer bist, der auch vor Ort gerne mal pragmatisch unterstützt, bist du bei uns genau richtig. Aufgaben 360-Grad-Marketing: Du entwickelst, steuerst und optimierst ganzheitliche Marketingkampagnen über verschiedene digitale Kanäle hinweg. Performance Marketing: Du
jobs.why: This is a generalist marketing manager role for a German real estate company, which will heavily prioritize local language skills and real estate experience.
jobs.proposal_opener: Want to scale your real estate lead generation? I script and design high-performing social ads that capture attention and drive direct-response actions.
jobs.flags: German language required, real estate focus
jobs.summary: This is a generalist marketing manager position for a German real estate firm, focusing on increasing brand visibility and managing performance marketing. It requires a hands-on approach to social media and digital campaigns.
